title: The Mindful Creator
main_description: You take your time to evaluate photo crops and captions carefully, prioritizing context and truth over instant popularity.
photo_trait_desc: You consistently select photo crops that preserve the true context and story behind the image.
caption_trait_desc: Your captions are well-considered and respectful, fostering healthy interactions in your timeline.

title: The Truth Seeker
main_description: You place full truth and transparency at the core of your digital footprint, making sure your audience always gets the whole picture.
photo_trait_desc: You consistently choose crop angles that reveal full context, avoiding misleading framing at all costs.
caption_trait_desc: Your captions clearly explain the reality of the situation, shutting down potential rumors before they start.

title: The Aesthetic Curator
main_description: You prioritize visual appeal and artistic composition, crafting a clean feed while keeping your overall message respectful.
photo_trait_desc: You focus on cropping for symmetry, light, and visual balance to make your posts look effortless.
caption_trait_desc: Your captions are concise and thoughtful, complementing the photo without grabbing unnecessary drama.

title: The Empathetic Storyteller
main_description: You use social media to build bridges and spread empathy, carefully considering how your posts affect others' feelings.
photo_trait_desc: You crop photos to highlight human connections and warmth while respecting people's privacy.
caption_trait_desc: You write empathetic captions that encourage positivity and mutual understanding among your followers.

title: The Engagement Strategist
main_description: You know how to play the social algorithm, creating content that generates discussion without crossing ethical lines.
photo_trait_desc: You crop photos to emphasize the most interesting focal point to maximize curiosity.
caption_trait_desc: You craft engaging questions and calls-to-action in your captions to keep the comment section active.

title: The Selective Narrator
main_description: You tend to crop photos in ways that tell a specific story, sometimes leaving out crucial details to control the narrative.
photo_trait_desc: You selectively crop images to show only what supports your viewpoint, omitting surrounding context.
caption_trait_desc: Your captions gently sway audience perception toward your intended interpretation of the photo.

title: The Hype Artisan
main_description: You thrive on excitement and enthusiasm, constantly turning everyday moments into major events for your feed.
photo_trait_desc: You zoom in on high-energy subjects to make every photo look dynamic and action-packed.
caption_trait_desc: Your captions lean heavily on hyped wording and punchy phrasing to build maximum buzz.

title: The Clickbait Maestro
main_description: You master the art of curiosity gaps, prioritizing maximum views and instant clicks over complete accuracy.
photo_trait_desc: You intentionally crop out key context to leave viewers guessing and forced to check your caption.
caption_trait_desc: You write tantalizing, dramatic headlines that tease the story without revealing the true outcome.

title: The Trend Chaser
main_description: You love following what's popular and keeping your content up to date, but sometimes you get caught up in trends without thinking about the impact of your posts.
photo_trait_desc: You consistently choose the most eye-catching parts of a photo to stay relevant, but sometimes you overlook the context behind what you share.
caption_trait_desc: You consistently use trendy and attention-grabbing captions, but sometimes prioritize engagement over the meaning and impact of your words.

title: The Impulse Poster
main_description: You post on emotion and quick instincts, sharing content in the heat of the moment without fully weighing the consequences.
photo_trait_desc: You pick crop frames spontaneously based on your immediate emotion rather than careful review.
caption_trait_desc: You type what you feel instantly, which can lead to misunderstood messages or unnecessary heat.

title: The Cynical Critic
main_description: You view the digital world through a skeptical lens, often using humor and sharp commentary to critique posts around you.
photo_trait_desc: You zoom in on embarrassing or awkward details in photos to make a point or joke.
caption_trait_desc: Your captions are witty and sarcastic, pointing out ironies but sometimes sounding harsh.

title: The Misleading Storyteller
main_description: You lean into sensational framing, pairing cropped photos with misleading narratives to spark dramatic reactions.
photo_trait_desc: You crop away reassuring context to make innocent photos look questionable or shocking.
caption_trait_desc: You write loaded captions that subtly nudge the audience into drawing wrong conclusions.

title: The Validation Seeker
main_description: You shape your content around what pleases your audience, heavily relying on public reaction to feel accomplished.
photo_trait_desc: You crop photos based strictly on what has previously received the most likes and approval.
caption_trait_desc: Your captions seek reassurance and agreement, often fishing for positive reinforcement.

title: The Controversy Seeker
main_description: You aren't afraid to stir the pot, intentionally posting polarizing images and captions to incite heated debate.
photo_trait_desc: You crop photos to highlight conflict, tension, or sensitive subjects to provoke reactions.
caption_trait_desc: You craft provocative captions designed to divide opinions and spark intense comment wars.

title: The Casual Sharer
main_description: You treat social media casually and without pressure, sharing low-stakes moments without overthinking their reach.
photo_trait_desc: You crop images quickly without worrying about perfectionism, aesthetics, or hidden meanings.
caption_trait_desc: Your captions are short, relaxed, and straightforward, reflecting your laid-back approach.

title: The Digital Wildcard
main_description: You keep your audience guessing with unpredictable content, mixing chaotic framing with surprising, edgy captions.
photo_trait_desc: You choose odd or unexpected crop angles that completely change how a photo is perceived.
caption_trait_desc: Your captions leave room for wildly different interpretations, inviting both confusion and intrigue.
